title: I Lost $10K Before Learning This CPI Trading Secret
description: Don't trade CPI data blind like I did. This smart money concept changed everything. CPI releases Monday - here's how to position before the chaos hits. ICT order blocks + fair value gaps = consistent profits.
script: I blew three accounts trading CPI releases. Made every rookie mistake possible. Then I learned about order blocks. Smart money leaves footprints before major news. Look for rejection at previous order blocks. That's where institutions positioned. CPI drops Monday. Use this setup. Follow R2F Trading for more.
